title: A clear conscience
question: 把今天的“失物归还”和 passive voice 放进校园场景：你在校门口发现一个钱包，交给学校办公室，并说明自己想问心无愧。用 word bank 补完整 5 个空。
example_answer: This wallet was found near the school gate. It must have been left by a student. I have given it to the school office. Everything is inside. I want to have a clear conscience.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 用被动语态说明钱包被发现的位置：这个钱包是在校门口附近被发现的
options.english_template: This wallet ___ near the school gate.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 用 must have been 表达有把握的推测：它一定是某个学生落下的

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 说明正确归还方式：我已经把它交给学校办公室了
options.english_template: I have given it to the ___.

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 说明没有只还一部分：所有东西都在里面

options.label: E
options.scenario_zh: 用 clear conscience 表达问心无愧：我想问心无愧
